leadText: The Electirizer (Japanese: エレキブースター Elecbooster) is a type of held item introduced in Generation IV. It allows Electabuzz to evolve into Electivire when traded while holding it.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Held item [ edit | edit source ] Causes Electabuzz to evolve into Electivire when traded while holding it. This consumes the Electirizer. In Pokémon Legends: Arceus , due to the absence of held items, the Electirizer simply needs to be used on Electabuzz to trigger the Evolution, which consumes the item.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] If the player offers both a Link Cable and Electirizer at Luminous Spring , Electabuzz can be evolved into Electivire . This consumes the Link Cable and Electirizer. If thrown, it will deal 1 damage (2 if sticky ). Using this item in a dungeon will consume it, with no effect.
